_description: SHARED SUPPRESSION LIST — Single source of truth for all LDR automation systems. Both the Python pond-nurture-bot and the TypeScript lifestyle-bot-dashboard read this file. Adding a tag here protects leads across ALL systems instantly.

_usage.python: Loaded by main.py via Rules.load() — merged into excluded_tags and is_excluded()
_usage.typescript: Fetched by botHelpers.ts via loadSharedSuppressionTags() from /api/suppression-tags endpoint or fallback to bundled copy
